Here is the question:

What is the sum of the interior angles of a triangle?

Options:
  A. 90 degrees
  B. 180 degrees
  C. 270 degrees
  D. 360 degrees

I'm not really sure about this one... I think it's either 180 or 360... I remember learning that the angles in a triangle add up to something, but I always get this mixed up with the angles in a quadrilateral...

My answer is: B. 180 degrees

I think this is right because... um... I'm pretty sure I saw it on a formula sheet or something? Or was it 360? Wait, no, that can't be right...
